title: Bad Math Homework
relevance_summary: Self-custodial wallet funds disappearing due to miscounted Bitcoin amounts

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers funds from self-custodial wallets without explicit user confirmation

monitoring_rules: Block any tx transferring funds from self-custodial wallets without explicit user confirmation
summary: SolvBTC's self-custodial wallet lost 25k BTC due to miscounted Bitcoin amounts, highlighting the importance of user confirmation for fund transfers.
